## Changes in v1.4.8

- Fixed macOS traffic light buttons (close/minimize/fullscreen) appearing on the overlay after a delay.
- Scroll events now pass through the overlay to the window behind, even when the cursor is over the overlay UI.
- Fixed overlay stealing tab focus — enforcement loop no longer re-asserts window levels at 100fps when interactive.
- Screenshot capture improvements and click-to-focus on HUD bar.

---

**Download:** **Jarvis-6.0-1.4.8-arm64.dmg** from Assets below.

**In-app update:** Users on earlier Jarvis 6.0 releases can update via Menu -> Check for updates.

**Note:** If you installed the AXRuntime-labeled build, install this DMG once manually to rejoin the Jarvis update channel.
